rule: Do not modify. Requires design approval.

topbar.description: Global fixed header. Present on every authenticated page. Never removed, never theme-switched.

slots.left: PAI logo only — height:26px. NEVER 'Prevalent AI' text.
slots.right: Last Updated label → bell icon → avatar → Navigator button (t-special, sz-sm)

rules: Background is always #131313 — never changes with light/dark theme.
Only PAI logo image — never display 'Prevalent AI' as text.
Navigator button always uses t-special variant — never primary or outline.

left-nav.description: Primary section navigation. Collapsible. Present on every authenticated page.

toggle.rule: Never remove this function or the toggle button — collapser is mandatory.

active-parent.note: Parent item stays grey when child is active — accent color is child-only.

active-child.note: Only the active leaf-level item gets accent color.

rules: Workspace label is the workspace name — never 'Prevalent AI'.
Active sub-item gets accent color #6360D8 and rgba(99,96,216,0.08) background.
Parent of active child stays grey (#f5f5f5 background) — no accent.
Max 7 nav items total — Miller's Law.
shellNavToggle() must always be present — never omit the collapse button.

sub-header.description: Sticky page-level bar below topbar. Two lines: title + breadcrumb. CTAs on right.

left_zone.rule: ALWAYS two separate lines. Never merge into one line. Never use <h1>.

rules: Always two lines — title on line 1, breadcrumb on line 2. Never merged.
Never use <h1> — page title is a <div> at 12px/500.
Filter button background:#e0dff7 default, #504bb8 when active.
Sub-header CTAs are right-aligned — left zone is title+breadcrumb only.
